task_completion.description: Verify that the agent logged in using the admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or interface is visible, and the user profile or top-right corner indicates the user is logged in as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the sections of the target course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the course information or section list for 'Introduction to Biology'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent changed the room for the Period 2 section to Science Lab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The room dropdown or input field for the 'Period 2' section is set to 'Science Lab' in the edit interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the room change for Period 2 was saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message is displayed, or the updated section list clearly shows 'Science Lab' as the room for the 'Period 2' section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Period 3 section was not moved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The section list shows that the room for the 'Period 3' section remains 'Room 304'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenSIS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the OpenSIS application, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the UI looks like the genuine OpenSIS interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to update the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL UPDATE commands or database scripts are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Course: 'Introduction to Biology'. Target Section: 'Period 2'. Original Room: 'Room 304'. New Room: 'Science Lab'. Distractor Section: 'Period 3' (Must remain in 'Room 304').
